case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. JAIME CANAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200041451)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 CONTINUED TO OCT-26-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-26-2021 CONTINUED TO DEC-28-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CANAS, JAIME , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2021
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-28-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
